chunks.text: ORDER SHEET IN THE HIGH COURT OF SINDH AT KARACHI C. P. No. D–2523 of 2015 (M.S. & Sons CNG Station Vs. Federation of Pakistan & others) DATE ORDER WITH SIGNATURE OF JUDGE(S). Priority 1. For hearing of Misc. No.11076/2015 (Exemption). 2. For hearing of main case..-.-.-.-.-.-.-.-.-.-.-.-.-.-.-.-.-. Dated 16.08.2024 Mr. Rehan Aziz Malik, Advocate for the petitioner. Mr. Khaleeq Ahmed, DAG..-.-.-.-.-.-.-.-.-.-.-.-.-.-.-.-.-. Learned counsel on instructions does not press this petition. Dismissed as not pressed. CHIEF JUSTICE JUDGE Asif
